---
description: "Use when writing or rewriting portfolio copy, case-study prose, resume or cover-letter content, interview notes, or other human-facing text in this repo. Applies to metro-awakening.html, job-search/**, and related writing tasks."
applyTo: "**/*.html,job-search/**,AGENTS.md"
---

# Human Writing Style

- For prose-heavy writing tasks in this repo, consult `.agents/references/ai-writing-tropes.md` before drafting or rewriting.
- Prefer concrete, specific wording over rhetorical setup, generic emphasis, or inflated claims.
- Rewrite sentences that rely on stock AI cadence, especially rhetorical question-answer turns, dramatic negation patterns, repeated triads, vague authority claims, and faux-suspense transitions.
- Avoid ornamental wording when simpler phrasing carries the point more directly.
- Keep portfolio writing technically grounded. Keep job-application writing factual, direct, and traceable to repository evidence.
